name: @markdown-contract/ui
description: The shared Vue component kit (D-0018 §D6): the status/severity visual language (design tokens + theme.css), finding rows, contract groups, and the empty/error/loading states, consumed by both apps/web/ui and apps/desktop. Plain Vue 3 + TypeScript — no Nuxt module machinery, no build step: `exports` points at the .vue/.ts SOURCE and each consuming app compiles it with its own pipeline.
author: sksizer
